metadata.scenario_name: S-DOT mission continuity in Seoul urban ground DDIL scenario
metadata.sdot_definition: S-DOT = Semantic Data On Tactical-network. This is a hackathon concept label, not an existing tactical-link standard.
metadata.safety_note: Public Seoul map and civil context plus synthetic unit/resource/network data. No real unit location, force disposition, protected-facility coordinates, personal data, or operational claim.

scenario.narrative: 12-1 becomes intermittently connected in a Seoul urban ground scenario while command staff monitor synthetic opposing route branches, public civil context, support resources, and candidate bearers through S-DOT semantic packets.

source_catalog.label: Synthetic urban unit state
source_catalog.source_rationale: Real unit locations and readiness are sensitive. The mock layer shows the schema and routing behavior without operational disclosure.
source_catalog.mock_notice: Fully synthetic unit and readiness data over a public Seoul map.

source_catalog.label: Synthetic DDIL network states
source_catalog.source_rationale: T3 differentiation comes from showing what survives under bandwidth, latency, packet loss, and link outage.
source_catalog.mock_notice: Synthetic network profile designed for repeatable demo behavior.

source_catalog.label: Authorized opportunistic bearer candidates
source_catalog.source_rationale: Korea's dense communications environment can be modeled as candidate bearers only when lawful authority, authentication, power, backhaul, and priority policies are satisfied.
source_catalog.mock_notice: Coarse or synthetic assets; not real base-station, AP, backbone, or military network data.

source_catalog.label: Korea civil infrastructure COP context
source_catalog.source_rationale: Public hospitals, public map tiles, building footprints, and aggregate infrastructure cells provide protected-civilian and support context.
source_catalog.mock_notice: Sensitive infrastructure is aggregate/coarse only. Public hospitals are protected support nodes, not targets.

source_catalog.label: Synthetic urban weather / visibility warning
source_catalog.source_rationale: Weather affects ground mobility, sensor confidence, and support route risk.
source_catalog.mock_notice: Synthetic warning; not an official forecast.

source_catalog.label: Synthetic public advisory / OSINT context
source_catalog.source_rationale: OSINT gives cited narrative context but must not be treated as sensor truth.
source_catalog.mock_notice: Synthetic advisory metadata; no operational claim.

source_catalog.label: Synthetic opposing-route assessment
source_catalog.source_rationale: The demo needs an opposing movement hypothesis, but real threat routes, order of battle, and tactical intelligence are sensitive.
source_catalog.mock_notice: Fully synthetic route candidates for UI and S-DOT prioritization only.

source_catalog.label: Synthetic support and sustainment resources
source_catalog.source_rationale: Support routing and resource allocation are demonstrated with public facility context plus synthetic support resources.
source_catalog.mock_notice: Synthetic support units and resource capacities.

operation_objective.primary_objective: 12-1의 로컬 상황도를 유지하고, 민간 응급 접근로를 보호하며, 상대 후보 기동축을 감시하면서 90초 재연결 창에 핵심 S-DOT 패킷을 동기화한다.
operation_objective.end_state: 고립·간헐 접속 상황에서도 지휘 의도, 최소 상황도, 자원 상태, 예측 불확실성, 재연결 감사가 유지된다.
decision_focus: 한강 통신 aggregate 승인 가능성 확인
Medic-2와 Comms Relay-3 지원 옵션 보존

adversary_assessment.label: 상대 기동 후보축(합성)
adversary_assessment.safety_note: Demo-only synthetic opposing movement assumptions; not real intelligence, operational guidance, or a targeting layer.

routes.why: 공개 도심 혼잡 맥락과 통신 저하가 겹쳐 감시 우선순위가 가장 높음.
한강 도하/통신 aggregate와 연결되지만 기상·혼잡 때문에 불확실성이 큼.
공공 의료/전력 aggregate 주변 경로라 보호 맥락상 모니터링만 유지.

mission_intent.commander_intent: Maintain minimum local awareness, protect civilian access, preserve unit continuity, and prioritize medical readiness and communications restoration under DDIL conditions.
constraints: No real unit data in demo
Use Seoul public map/civil data as context only
Treat civil infrastructure as candidate bearer, not guaranteed access
Human approval required for support decisions

predicted_state.likely_phase: Phase 2: hold local COP and await contact window
hold relay option near authorized bearer candidate

pace_bearer_ladder.label: 전술 IP망
pace_bearer_ladder.risk_note: 실제 전술망 세부는 데모에 포함하지 않음.

pace_bearer_ladder.label: 승인형 민간/공공 bearer
pace_bearer_ladder.risk_note: 법적 권한, 인증, 전력, 백홀, 보안, 감청 위험 검토 필요.

pace_bearer_ladder.label: 메시/스토어-포워드
pace_bearer_ladder.role: 접속창 전까지 로컬 저장 후 재연결 감사
pace_bearer_ladder.risk_note: 실시간 지휘가 아니라 임무 지속성과 사후 동기화에 초점.

korea_civil_infra_context.safety_boundary: No exact sensitive telecom rooms, backbone routes, substations, or protected-facility coordinates are included.
korea_civil_infra_context.use_note: Used as authorized opportunistic bearer/resource context only; not a guaranteed military network or real force-support layer.

medical_facilities.name: National Medical Center
medical_facilities.role: regional emergency care and public medical coordination

medical_facilities.name: Seoul National University Hospital
medical_facilities.role: tertiary emergency and trauma-capable medical support

medical_facilities.name: Severance Hospital
medical_facilities.role: tertiary emergency care and west-Seoul medical anchor

medical_facilities.name: Asan Medical Center
medical_facilities.role: east-Seoul tertiary emergency and high-capacity care

communications_context_cells.label: North ridge wireless coverage aggregate
communications_context_cells.public_source_candidate: KCA mountain-area mobile radio station API
communications_context_cells.note: Exact base-station locations are intentionally omitted.

communications_context_cells.label: Han River crossing communications aggregate
communications_context_cells.public_source_candidate: radio station statistics + synthetic coverage model
communications_context_cells.note: Represents expected civilian communications load around crossings.

communications_context_cells.label: South-east hospital corridor communications aggregate
communications_context_cells.public_source_candidate: public radio statistics + service continuity assumption
communications_context_cells.note: No telecom room or backbone route is displayed.

power_it_aggregates.label: Public-sector IT operating facilities aggregate
power_it_aggregates.source_candidate: MOIS public-sector IT operating facilities list
power_it_aggregates.safe_use: support continuity planning and restoration prioritization, not facility targeting

power_it_aggregates.label: Seoul regional power dependency context
power_it_aggregates.source_candidate: KPX power market generation facility info + public renewable datasets
power_it_aggregates.safe_use: show dependency and restoration context without substation/backbone coordinates

power_it_aggregates.label: National core infrastructure statistics
power_it_aggregates.safe_use: display category awareness, not exact protected-facility locations

semantic_events.summary: Central and north-east hospitals provide overlapping emergency-care capacity near the AOI.
semantic_events.why_it_matters: Civilian casualty evacuation and hospital access routes should stay protected and unobstructed.
semantic_events.recommended_action: Maintain protected medical corridors, monitor congestion, and coordinate with civil authorities.

semantic_events.summary: CBD building density and civilian exposure are high around the central AOI.
semantic_events.why_it_matters: Operations near dense civilian areas require stricter deconfliction and emergency-service access.
semantic_events.recommended_action: Use aggregate exposure to guide protection, evacuation support, and movement deconfliction.

semantic_events.summary: Communications demand may concentrate around Han River crossing corridors.
semantic_events.why_it_matters: Civil warning, responder coordination, and restoration teams may need priority connectivity support.
semantic_events.recommended_action: Prioritize resilient civilian communications and do not disclose exact telecom facility locations.

semantic_events.summary: Public IT facilities and regional power dependency should be treated as continuity context, not target data.
semantic_events.why_it_matters: Staff should understand service continuity dependencies while avoiding disclosure of sensitive nodes.
semantic_events.recommended_action: Show district aggregate, protect restoration access, and keep exact sensitive facility data out of the COP.

safety_rules: Use real public hospital data as protected civilian assets only.
Represent telecom, public IT, power, and national core infrastructure as aggregate or synthetic layers.
Do not infer targets, vulnerabilities, attack paths, or exact protected-facility locations.
Use this COP for deconfliction, protection, restoration, evacuation support, and continuity planning.

source_catalog.precision_allowed: public exact for hospitals; no patient or PII data
building footprints can be public; demo uses aggregate exposure cells

source_catalog.source: KCA mountain-area mobile radio station API
source_catalog.precision_allowed: limited public wireless data; exact telecom backbone and rooms omitted

source_catalog.source: KPX generation facility / power market APIs
source_catalog.precision_allowed: regional/generator metadata; avoid sensitive substation/transmission detail

support_options.supports_objective: 12-1 의료 standby와 민간 응급 접근로 보호
support_options.why_ranked: Best protected medical-context alignment with acceptable route risk and no additional comms authorization dependency.

support_options.supports_objective: 한강 통신 aggregate 후보 검증과 재연결 창 확보
support_options.why_ranked: Fastest communications restoration option, but authorization and backhaul uncertainty reduce confidence.

support_options.supports_objective: 12-1 로컬 COP 캐시와 S-DOT outbox 생존시간 연장
support_options.why_ranked: Useful for endurance, but less urgent than medical standby and comms relay.

sdot_messages.decision_value: Keeps local decisions aligned with mission intent while disconnected.
Changes support allocation because power and medical status are degrading.
Triggers ranking of Medic-2, Comms Relay-3, and Power Pack A.
Identifies Han River aggregate as possible but authorization-gated bearer.
Determines which queued bundles are sent during a 90-second contact window.

open_questions: Did Alpha-1 remain inside the predicted branch corridor?
Did power saving preserve local COP until contact?
Was the Han River aggregate legally/technically available as a bearer?

observations.claim: Central Seoul link quality dropped below semantic-summary threshold near the Han River crossing corridor.
Rain and reduced visibility raise movement risk across Mapo/Yeouido river-crossing routes.
Public advisory context flags congestion and emergency-service access pressure around the central business district.
Unconfirmed field report conflicts with predicted Alpha-1 branch timing and should remain contested.
Alpha-1 entered intermittent contact; power at 42%, local COP cached, medical support priority elevated.
Mission intent packet prioritizes civilian protection, unit continuity, medical readiness, and critical comms restoration.
Han River communications aggregate is a candidate bearer, but legal authority, authentication, power, backhaul, and security conditions are unresolved.
Medic-2 support option can stage near the public hospital corridor in 28 minutes if the north-central route remains open.
CBD building density and civilian exposure are high, requiring deconfliction and emergency access preservation.
Central and north-east hospitals provide overlapping public medical support capacity near the AOI.
Public IT and regional power dependency are continuity context only; exact protected-facility coordinates stay out of the COP.
Synthetic assessment ranks opposing candidate axis A as the highest watch priority, with axis B and C retained as lower-confidence branches.

evidence_bundles.source_rationale: Evidence bundle keeps public context, synthetic unit state, and uncertainty visible instead of flattening them into a single truth value.

semantic_events.summary: Central Seoul link quality moved from delta sync to semantic summary.
semantic_events.why_it_matters: The command room can no longer assume raw map/evidence sync, so intent, readiness, support, and uncertainty packets must be prioritized.
semantic_events.recommended_action: Switch to semantic summary mode and queue raw context for store-forward sync.
semantic_events.mock_notice: Synthetic event over a public Seoul map for safe hackathon demo.

semantic_events.summary: Rain and reduced visibility increase ground movement and confirmation risk.
semantic_events.why_it_matters: Weather lowers confidence in visual-only reporting and can slow medical, power, and relay support options.
semantic_events.recommended_action: Increase route uncertainty and prioritize compact readiness/support packets.
semantic_events.mock_notice: Synthetic event over a public Seoul map for safe hackathon demo.

semantic_events.summary: River-crossing movement constraints may delay support and rejoin windows.
semantic_events.why_it_matters: A support option that looks close on a map may be low value if crossings, weather, and congestion degrade movement.
semantic_events.recommended_action: Rank support as options, not automatic dispatch; keep human approval in the loop.
semantic_events.mock_notice: Synthetic event over a public Seoul map for safe hackathon demo.

semantic_events.summary: Synthetic opposing candidate axis A is the current watch priority, but it remains a probability branch rather than confirmed movement.
semantic_events.why_it_matters: Command staff need a visible route hypothesis without mistaking it for real-time tracking or verified intelligence.
semantic_events.recommended_action: Keep 12-2 on CBD watch, preserve 12-3 relay near the crossing aggregate, and transmit the axis summary only as a compact S-DOT watch card.
semantic_events.mock_notice: Synthetic event over a public Seoul map for safe hackathon demo.

semantic_events.summary: CBD building density and civilian exposure are high around the central AOI.
semantic_events.why_it_matters: Urban ground support must preserve emergency access and avoid treating public civilian context as a targeting layer.
semantic_events.recommended_action: Use exposure as deconfliction and protection context only.
semantic_events.mock_notice: Synthetic event over a public Seoul map for safe hackathon demo.

semantic_events.summary: Public hospitals provide overlapping medical support context near the AOI.
semantic_events.why_it_matters: Protected civilian medical capacity is critical context for support planning, but not a military asset to command.
semantic_events.recommended_action: Show as protected support context and route Medic-2 staging through human approval.
semantic_events.mock_notice: Synthetic event over a public Seoul map for safe hackathon demo.

semantic_events.summary: Public IT and power dependency are continuity context, not precise protected-facility data.
semantic_events.why_it_matters: Command staff need continuity awareness without exposing sensitive nodes or creating target-like maps.
semantic_events.recommended_action: Display district/regional aggregate only and keep exact sensitive facility coordinates out.
semantic_events.mock_notice: Synthetic event over a public Seoul map for safe hackathon demo.

semantic_events.summary: Alpha-1 shifted to intermittent contact with local COP only partially visible to HQ.
semantic_events.why_it_matters: HQ cannot treat the last known position as live truth; the command board must switch to branch scenarios with uncertainty.
semantic_events.recommended_action: Send only intent and critical support packets; keep local event log queued for rejoin.
semantic_events.mock_notice: Synthetic event over a public Seoul map for safe hackathon demo.

semantic_events.summary: Alpha-1 needs medical standby and power extension before the next contact window.
semantic_events.why_it_matters: Power depletion can break the local COP and S-DOT outbox before the unit physically moves out of the urban corridor.
semantic_events.recommended_action: Rank Medic-2 and Comms Relay-3 as support options; reserve contact window for readiness and route packets.
semantic_events.mock_notice: Synthetic event over a public Seoul map for safe hackathon demo.

semantic_events.summary: Han River communications aggregate is a candidate emergency bearer but not automatically available.
semantic_events.why_it_matters: Dense Korean infrastructure may help continuity only if legal status, authentication, power, backhaul, security, and congestion conditions align.
semantic_events.recommended_action: Show as authorized opportunistic bearer candidate; do not assume access.
semantic_events.mock_notice: Synthetic event over a public Seoul map for safe hackathon demo.

semantic_events.summary: Next 90-second contact window is predicted near the Alpha-1 branch corridor.
semantic_events.why_it_matters: The S-DOT queue must choose which messages to send before the window closes.
semantic_events.recommended_action: Transmit intent receipt, readiness snapshot, and support request before lower-priority evidence.
semantic_events.mock_notice: Synthetic event over a public Seoul map for safe hackathon demo.

semantic_events.summary: Composite brief: Alpha-1 intermittent contact, route uncertainty, public medical context, and candidate bearer state converge.
semantic_events.why_it_matters: This is the highest-value command-continuity message when the link can only carry one alert card.
semantic_events.recommended_action: Send composite S-DOT card, queue raw map/building/context data, and prepare rejoin audit.
semantic_events.mock_notice: Synthetic event over a public Seoul map for safe hackathon demo.

full_sync.label: Full Sync
full_sync.description: Full event details and selected raw evidence can move.

delta_sync.label: Delta Sync
delta_sync.description: Changed tracks, compact event deltas, and evidence refs move.

semantic_summary.label: Semantic Summary
semantic_summary.description: Only high-priority alert cards and object lists move.

store_forward.label: Store Forward
store_forward.description: Most messages queue locally; only critical summaries move.

local_only.label: Local Only
local_only.description: No remote transmission. Local COP shows stale-data warnings.

network.label: Full Sync
network.description: Full event details and selected raw evidence can move.

network.label: Delta Sync
network.description: Changed tracks, compact event deltas, and evidence refs move.

network.label: Semantic Summary
network.description: Only high-priority alert cards and object lists move.

network.label: Store Forward
network.description: Most messages queue locally; only critical summaries move.

network.label: Local Only
network.description: No remote transmission. Local COP shows stale-data warnings.

briefing.headline: S-DOT should preserve intent, readiness, support options, uncertainty, and rejoin audit when raw map/context data cannot move.

grounded_claims.claim: Alpha-1 is intermittently connected and should be shown as predicted branch scenarios, not live tracking.
Mission intent prioritizes civilian protection, medical readiness, local awareness, and comms restoration.
Opposing movement is shown only as synthetic probability branches, with candidate axis A at the highest watch priority.
Civil communication aggregates are candidate bearers only if authorization, authentication, power, backhaul, congestion, and security align.
Medic-2 is the highest-ranked support option in the synthetic Seoul scenario.
Dense CBD exposure is deconfliction/protection context, not a targeting or force-disposition layer.
Public IT/power dependencies remain aggregate-only continuity context.
Weather and network degradation reduce raw-feed confirmation.

briefing.operator_summary: Send intent receipt, readiness snapshot, and support request before lower-priority context; queue raw map/building/context data for later sync; keep all unit/resource data synthetic in public demos.
